response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack/web engineer with strong software craftsmanship, but the role requires principal-level hardware expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design. His closest relevant experience is low-latency DLang backend work and brief C/C++ tooling at National Instruments, which does not approach the required depth in computer architecture, GPU/SIMD/MIMD systems, or deep-learning workload optimization. The 20 years of experience satisfy the tenure bar but not the domain requirements.
strengths: Long track record (2006–present) across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec in DLang with async I/O and fibers)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, and technical teaching/workshops
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, silicon architecture, or hardware performance-modeling experience
No GPU, SIMD/MIMD, or AI accelerator background; no deep-learning training/inference optimization work
Career trajectory is web/product engineering, not principal-level computer architecture or hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: No AI/DL workload or GPU optimization experience
